title: Munchkin Ocean Bath Toy (Pack of 4)
features: MUNCHKIN BABY BATH TOYS: Set of 4 sea animal bath toys that squirt water and float, perfect for creating exciting water play during bath time.
FUN KIDS BATH TOY: Creative baby bath toys, perfect sized for little hands to grasp, hold and squeeze, making it an essential baby bathroom accessory for toddler through to older children.
EDUCATIONAL: Helps develop motor skills, bright and vibrant interactive colours to keep your little one entartained during bath time.
THE IDEAL GIFT FOR 24 MONTHS AND OVER: The perfect bath toys for 3 year olds, bath toys for 2 year olds, toddlers, babies and older children. Bathtime toys to encourage creativity and coordination
PART OF THE MUNCHKIN BATHTIME RANGE: Innovative baby bath time products, baby toys and washing essentials such as bathmats, shampoo rinsers and toy storage - all designed with your little one in mind
description: From the manufacturer Add These Ocean Friends To Your Bathtime Mix And Watch The Adventures Unfold This pack of 4 fun ocean squirts includes a clown fish, crab, whale, and Turtle. Help baby develop fine motor skills while learning to identify animal names and sounds! These brightly-coloured toys float, squirt water, and are sized just right for little hands to grasp and squeeze. They're also durable, so you don't have to worry about chipping or breaking. Our innovative designs, and great values are why Munchkin products are top sellers all around the world. We believe that snacking should be fun, and each mealtime is a great way to connect with baby. Munchkin's range of Best-Selling Miracle 360° Cups are a household must-have - These revolutionary spoutless sippy and trainer cups allow babies and toddlers to drink from anywhere around the rim, just like a regular cup, with a completely spill-proof design. The spoutless 360° rim is dentist recommended because it supports normal muscle development in a child's mouth. The Brica by Munchkin travel range offers a solution whether travelling in the car or out for a stroll in the pushchair. Combining safety and convenience, the range helps provide safety, comforts and convenience whilst on the go. Munchkin's here to help lull your little one to dreamland with our collection of soothers, white noise machines, nightlights, and toddler bed rails—you both will sleep soundly knowing your baby is comforted by sweet sleep sounds and cosy comforts. product_details_tab_data.Title: Munchkin Ocean Bath Toy (Pack of 4)
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Toys & Games › Baby & Toddler Toys › Bath Toys
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning! For your child's safety and health. To prevent drowning keep children within arm's reach. Inspect before use. Discard and replace at the first sign of weakness or damage. Always check temperature of water before placing child in bath. This product should not be used as a teether and should be used under adult supervision only. Do not leave child unattended. Please read and retain this information for future reference. Remove all packaging components before giving to a child.
